Services.title: Our Programs
Services.subtitle: Expertly designed study programs tailored to each student's goal.

6-sinif.title: 6th Grade
6-sinif.description: Reinforcing middle school foundations. 2 days/weekend, 12 lesson hours/week, study sessions and guidance support.
6-sinif.hero_quote: Every reinforced piece of knowledge brings you one step closer to LGS.
6-sinif.intro: Our 6th grade program ensures students deeply grasp the middle school curriculum and transition to 7th grade prepared.
6-sinif.body: Students attend courses 2 days on weekends (Saturday and Sunday). They receive 12 lesson hours in total. Extra weekly question-solving study sessions are held. Students attend study sessions 1 day per week on weekdays. They can ask their questions during one-on-one question-solving hours with teachers. Through the Kunduz program, students can ask teachers questions at any time and place. Recognition and attention tests are conducted by our Guidance Unit. Students' emotional and psychological states are reported. Progress charts are saved to our digital application. Students reinforce their knowledge through new-generation questions. Activities include exam preparation, LGS familiarization, supplementary school subject training, reading activities, attention-improving exercises, reading comprehension and test technique development.
6-sinif.phase1_text: In-depth coverage of Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies topics.
6-sinif.phase2_text: Regular topic tests and assessment exams. Parent information reports.
6-sinif.phase3_text: Advisor teacher and guidance unit support that individually monitors each student's development.
6-sinif.result_text: Strong foundational knowledge, exam habits and a smooth transition to the 7th grade program.
6-sinif.tech_intro: Weekend course (Sat-Sun), 1 weekday study session. Total 12 lesson hours.
6-sinif.tech_tools: Subject instruction · Test solving · Study sessions · Guidance
6-sinif.meta_description: Comprehensive 12-hour-per-week program with study sessions and guidance for 6th grade students.

7-sinif.title: 7th Grade
7-sinif.description: Preparation for 8th grade by strengthening middle school foundations. 12 lesson hours per week, individual guidance and one-on-one Q&A.
7-sinif.hero_quote: A strong foundation builds a bright future.
7-sinif.intro: Our 7th grade program aims to help students build a solid foundation in Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies.
7-sinif.body: Students attend courses 2 days on weekends and 1 day per week on weekdays. They receive 12 lesson hours in total. Question-solving study sessions and one-on-one question-solving are also conducted. They can ask their questions during one-on-one question-solving hours with teachers. Through the Kunduz program, students can ask teachers questions at any time and place. Students participate in weekly individual counseling sessions, personal study schedules are prepared and checked by our guidance unit, with parents informed weekly. Library access is available 7 days a week from 09:00 to 19:00. Professional tests and inventories are applied for each student. Attention tests are conducted and students' psychological and emotional states are added to their files. Each student is given a recognition exam and their level is determined. Individual study programs are prepared by our guidance units for each student. Students reinforce their knowledge through new-generation questions. Activities include exam preparation, LGS adaptation, test technique improvement, improving academic success, LGS mock exams, high school visits, speed reading and comprehension techniques, and attention-improving exercises. Study camps are organized including summer camp, mid-term camp, break camp and semester break camp.
7-sinif.phase1_text: In-depth coverage of Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies topics.
7-sinif.phase2_text: Regular topic tests and assessment exams. Parent information reports.
7-sinif.phase3_text: Advisor teacher support that individually monitors each student's development process.
7-sinif.result_text: Strong foundational knowledge, exam habits and smooth transition to the 8th grade program.
7-sinif.tech_intro: 2 days on weekends and 1 day on weekdays. Total 12 lesson hours. Study sessions and one-on-one Q&A included.
7-sinif.tech_tools: Subject instruction · Test solving · Individual guidance · Camp programs
7-sinif.meta_description: Comprehensive 12-hour-per-week program with individual guidance and one-on-one Q&A for 7th grade students.

8-sinif.title: 8th Grade & LGS
8-sinif.description: Intensive LGS preparation. 12 lesson hours/week, weekly mock exams, AI-powered analysis and individual guidance.
8-sinif.hero_quote: With the right strategy and intensive study, your target school is within reach in LGS.
8-sinif.intro: Our 8th grade program is a comprehensive LGS-focused preparation process. It familiarizes students with the LGS format, maximizes their net score and closely monitors individual development.
8-sinif.body: Students attend 2 days on weekends and 2 days on weekdays. They receive 12 lesson hours in total. Each student can solve questions one-on-one with their teacher. They can ask their questions during one-on-one question-solving hours with teachers. Through the Kunduz program, students can reach teachers at any time and place. Students take one mock exam per week. After each mock exam, analyses are conducted and question banks are created based on their level and weak areas. The Baykuş library program allows evening study sessions under teacher supervision. Students participate in weekly individual counseling sessions and personal study schedules are prepared and checked by our guidance unit. Library access is available 7 days a week from 09:00 to 19:00. Motivation activities are conducted to eliminate distractions. LGS mock provizionals are held and AI-powered individual question banks are created. Guidance units prepare and monitor weekly individual programs. Activities include exam preparation, quality high school visits, goal setting, motivation events, reading comprehension and speed reading. Study camps include summer camp, mid-term camp, break camp and semester break camp.
8-sinif.phase1_text: Systematic revision of all LGS topics and weekly mock exams to address weak points.
8-sinif.phase2_text: Mock exam analyses and AI-powered individual question bank creation. Bayküş library program.
8-sinif.phase3_text: Weekly individual guidance, motivation activities, quality high school introductions and camp programs.
8-sinif.result_text: Achieving a high net score in LGS and placing in a science high school, Anatolian high school or target quality high school.
8-sinif.tech_title: 12 lesson hours/week · Weekly mock exam · AI Analysis
8-sinif.tech_intro: 2 days on weekends and 2 days on weekdays. Total 12 lesson hours. Weekly mock exam and AI-powered analysis.
8-sinif.tech_tools: LGS topic revision · Weekly mock exam · AI analysis · Individual guidance
8-sinif.meta_title: 8th Grade & LGS Preparation | Tarabya Final Academy
8-sinif.meta_description: Intensive 12-hour-per-week preparation program for LGS with weekly mock exams and AI-powered analysis.

8-sinif-vip.title: 8th Grade VIP
8-sinif-vip.description: VIP program with classes of up to 8 students. 14 lesson hours/week, weekly mock exams, individual tutoring and AI-powered analysis.
8-sinif-vip.hero_quote: With smaller classes and personal attention, your LGS goal is closer than ever.
8-sinif-vip.intro: Our 8th Grade VIP program limits class sizes to a maximum of 8 students, ensuring every student receives the individual attention they deserve during intensive LGS preparation.
8-sinif-vip.body: Students attend 2 days on weekends and 2 days on weekdays for a total of 14 lesson hours per week. Each student has dedicated one-on-one question-solving time with their teacher. Weekly mock exams are followed by AI-powered analysis and personalized question banks. Individual counseling sessions are held weekly, and progress is shared with parents regularly.
8-sinif-vip.phase1_text: 14 lesson hours/week in classes of up to 8 students. Guaranteed individual attention throughout LGS preparation.
8-sinif-vip.phase2_text: Weekly LGS mock exams, AI-powered personal question bank creation and weak area targeting.
8-sinif-vip.phase3_text: Weekly individual counseling sessions, advisor teacher monitoring and regular parent updates.
8-sinif-vip.phase4_text: Topic-based question solving sessions, special study camp programs and motivation activities.
8-sinif-vip.result_text: Achieving a high net score in LGS and placing in a science high school or target Anatolian high school.
8-sinif-vip.tech_intro: Small class guarantee, weekly mock exams and AI analysis. 2 days weekend + 2 days weekday.
8-sinif-vip.tech_tools: Small class (max 8) · 14 hours/week · Weekly mock · AI analysis · Private tutoring
8-sinif-vip.meta_description: 8th Grade VIP program. Max 8 students per class, 14 hours/week, weekly mock exams and AI analysis.

8-sinif-vip-ozel-dersli.title: 8th Grade VIP + Private
8-sinif-vip-ozel-dersli.description: VIP program with up to 8 students plus dedicated private tutoring sessions tailored to each student's weak areas.
8-sinif-vip-ozel-dersli.hero_quote: The ultimate LGS preparation: small classes, personal coaching and private lessons combined.
8-sinif-vip-ozel-dersli.intro: Our 8th Grade VIP + Private program combines the VIP small-class experience with additional one-on-one private tutoring, delivering the most personalized LGS preparation available.
8-sinif-vip-ozel-dersli.body: Students attend 14 lesson hours per week in classes of at most 8 students, plus scheduled private tutoring sessions focused on their individual weak areas. Weekly mock exams are analyzed with AI tools to generate personalized question banks. Individual counseling runs alongside the academic program to keep motivation and focus high throughout the year.
8-sinif-vip-ozel-dersli.phase1_text: 14 lesson hours/week, max 8 students per class. Strong peer learning environment with guaranteed personal attention.
8-sinif-vip-ozel-dersli.phase2_text: Scheduled one-on-one private lessons targeting each student's personal weak areas and accelerating progress.
8-sinif-vip-ozel-dersli.phase3_text: Weekly LGS mock exams, AI analysis, individual counseling and weekly parent communication.
8-sinif-vip-ozel-dersli.phase4_text: Topic revision sessions, study camp programs and motivational activities throughout the year.

10-sinif.title: 10th Grade
10-sinif.description: Early YKS preparation with TYT foundations. 12 lesson hours/week, regular mock exams and individual guidance.
10-sinif.hero_quote: Starting YKS preparation in 10th grade gives you a decisive advantage.
10-sinif.intro: Our 10th Grade program focuses on building strong TYT foundations early, giving students a head start on their YKS journey with systematic topic coverage and regular mock exams.
10-sinif.body: Students attend courses 2 days on weekends and 1 day on weekdays, totaling 12 lesson hours per week. Topic tests and mock exams are held regularly, with results analyzed to identify and address weak areas. An advisor teacher monitors each student's academic progress and communicates with parents monthly.
10-sinif.phase1_text: Systematic coverage of core TYT subjects: Math, Turkish, Science and Social Studies.
10-sinif.phase2_text: Regular topic tests and TYT-format mock exams. Personalized feedback and parent updates.
10-sinif.phase3_text: Advisor teacher support, personal study plan preparation and motivation coaching.
10-sinif.result_text: Strong TYT foundations, structured study habits and a confident start into the intensive YKS process.
10-sinif.tech_intro: 2 weekend days plus 1 weekday, total 12 lesson hours per week. Mock exams and guidance included.
10-sinif.tech_tools: Subject instruction · TYT mock exams · Individual guidance · Study plan
10-sinif.meta_description: 10th grade early YKS preparation. 12 lesson hours/week with regular mock exams and individual guidance.

11-sinif.title: 11th Grade
11-sinif.description: TYT + AYT preparation. 14 lesson hours/week, bi-weekly mock exams and individual guidance.
11-sinif.hero_quote: 11th grade is the year your YKS future is shaped — make the most of every week.
11-sinif.intro: Our 11th Grade program intensifies YKS preparation with combined TYT and AYT topic coverage, bi-weekly mock exams and dedicated individual guidance.
11-sinif.body: Students attend 2 days on weekends and 2 days on weekdays, totaling 14 lesson hours per week. Mock exams are held every two weeks and analyzed in detail to create targeted study plans. An advisor teacher monitors progress and meets with parents monthly. Study camps and motivation activities are integrated throughout the year.
11-sinif.phase1_text: Comprehensive coverage of TYT core subjects and AYT field subjects throughout the academic year.
11-sinif.phase2_text: TYT + AYT mock exams every two weeks, detailed analysis and personalized study plan updates.
11-sinif.phase3_text: Advisor teacher monitoring, individual counseling sessions, university introduction events and parent communication.
11-sinif.result_text: Solid TYT and AYT foundations, strong exam habits and readiness for intensive 12th grade preparation.
11-sinif.tech_intro: 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays, 14 lesson hours/week. TYT+AYT mocks every 2 weeks.

12-sinif.title: 12th Grade
12-sinif.description: Intensive YKS preparation. 16 lesson hours/week, bi-weekly mock exams and individual guidance.
12-sinif.hero_quote: This is your year — with the right strategy and consistent effort, your target university is reachable.
12-sinif.intro: Our 12th Grade program provides intensive YKS preparation with comprehensive TYT and AYT coverage, bi-weekly mock exams and dedicated individual guidance throughout the final year.
12-sinif.body: Students attend 2 days on weekends and 2 days on weekdays, totaling 16 lesson hours per week. Mock exams are held every two weeks, analyzed in detail and used to generate personalized study plans. An advisor teacher monitors each student closely and communicates with parents regularly. Study camps and motivation activities are integral parts of the program.
12-sinif.phase1_text: Comprehensive coverage of all TYT and AYT subjects. Systematic topic revision and test solving.
12-sinif.phase2_text: TYT+AYT mock exams every two weeks, detailed analysis and targeted weak area study plans.
12-sinif.phase3_text: Individual counseling, advisor teacher tracking, university introduction events and regular parent communication.
12-sinif.result_text: Achieving the target YKS score and securing a place at the desired university.
12-sinif.tech_intro: 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays, 16 lesson hours/week. TYT+AYT mocks every 2 weeks with guidance.

12-sinif-vip.title: 12th Grade VIP
12-sinif-vip.description: VIP classes of 5-8 students, 16 lesson hours/week, 45 mock exams and 40 hours of individual tutoring.
12-sinif-vip.hero_quote: In this final year before YKS, every student deserves individual attention – our VIP program delivers exactly that.
12-sinif-vip.intro: Our 12th Grade VIP program keeps class sizes between 5-8 students. Students attend a total of 16 lesson hours per week (two days on weekends, two days on weekdays). Each student can solve questions one-on-one with their teacher and receive up to 40 individual tutoring hours throughout the year.
12-sinif-vip.body: Through the Kunduz program, students can ask teachers questions anytime and anywhere. The Baykuş library program allows evening study sessions under teacher supervision. Mock exams are held every two weeks, and personalized study schedules targeting weak areas are prepared from analyses. Education coaches monitor these schedules weekly and share updates with parents. AI-powered individual question banks are created, and motivation workshops and concentration tests are applied regularly. University visits, goal-setting sessions, speed reading techniques, summer camps and mid-term camps are all integral parts of the program.
12-sinif-vip.phase1_text: 16 lesson hours/week in classes of 5-8 students. Individual attention guaranteed with up to 40 hours of personal tutoring per year.
12-sinif-vip.phase2_text: 45 TYT-AYT mock exams per year, national ranking results and AI-powered personal question bank creation.
12-sinif-vip.phase3_text: Weekly individual counseling, education coach monitoring, university introductions and regular parent updates.
12-sinif-vip.result_text: Reaching the target score in YKS and securing a place at the desired university by making the most of every moment throughout the year.
12-sinif-vip.tech_title: VIP Program · 16 lesson hours/week · 45 Mock Exams
12-sinif-vip.tech_intro: Intensive lessons in small classes, individual tutoring and AI-powered analysis offered together.
12-sinif-vip.tech_tools: Small class (5-8 students) · 16 hours/week · 45 mock exams · 40 hours tutoring
12-sinif-vip.meta_description: 12th Grade VIP program. 5-8 students per class, 16 hours/week, 45 mock exams and 40 hours of tutoring.

mezun.title: Graduate
mezun.description: Standard graduate program. Intensive YKS preparation for those repeating the year, 12 lesson hours/week and weekly mock exams.
mezun.hero_quote: Preparing for YKS one more year is not starting over – it is continuing stronger.
mezun.intro: Our Graduate VIP program keeps class sizes between 5-8 students. Students receive a total of 18 lesson hours per week, take individual question-solving sessions with their teachers, and can access up to 40 individual tutoring hours throughout the year.
mezun.body: Through the Kunduz program, students can reach teachers at any time and place. The Baykuş library program allows evening study under teacher supervision. Two mock exams are held per week, and AI-powered analyses create personalized question banks tailored to each student's level and weak areas. Weekly individual counseling sessions are conducted, coaches monitor programs and update parents regularly. The program begins with a Summer Camp for an early start, and university introduction events, motivation activities and camp programs are conducted throughout the year.
mezun.phase1_text: 18 lesson hours/week in classes of 5-8 students. Up to 40 hours of individual tutoring and continuous teacher access.
mezun.phase2_text: 2 YKS mock exams per week with AI-powered weak area analysis and student-specific question bank creation.
mezun.phase3_text: Early start with a Summer Camp, weekly individual counseling, parent tracking and university introduction events.
mezun.result_text: Achieve the target YKS score and secure admission to the desired university and department.
mezun.tech_title: VIP Graduate Program · 18 lesson hours/week · 2 Mock Exams/Week
mezun.tech_intro: Intensive lessons in small classes, AI-powered analysis and Summer Camp kickoff for a strong YKS preparation.
mezun.tech_tools: Small class (5-8 students) · 18 hours/week · 2 mock exams/week · 40 hours tutoring
mezun.meta_description: Intensive YKS preparation for graduates. 12 lesson hours/week and weekly mock exams.

deneme-kulubu.title: Mock Exam Club
deneme-kulubu.description: Regular LGS mock exams, net analysis and peer learning. Open to all grade levels.
deneme-kulubu.hero_quote: Every mock exam takes you one step forward.
deneme-kulubu.intro: The Mock Exam Club aims to provide regular exam experience to all middle school grade students. Weekly LGS format mock exams and detailed net analysis.
deneme-kulubu.body: Students continuously improve through group evaluation sessions and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.phase1_text: Full weekly mock exams in LGS format. Practice under real exam conditions.
deneme-kulubu.phase2_text: Topic-based net analysis after mock exams, individual review of incorrectly answered questions.
deneme-kulubu.phase3_text: Group sessions where students evaluate together and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.result_text: Continuously increasing net score, exam habits and strengthened confidence.
deneme-kulubu.tech_intro: Weekly mock exams in LGS format. Analysis sessions included.
deneme-kulubu.tech_tools: Weekly mock exam · Net analysis · Group evaluation · Progress tracking
deneme-kulubu.meta_title: Mock Exam Club | Tarabya Final Academy
deneme-kulubu.meta_description: Weekly LGS format mock exams, net analysis and group evaluation.

ozel-ders.title: Private Tutoring
ozel-ders.description: Fully personalized one-on-one lessons with expert instructors, tailored to each student's needs.
ozel-ders.hero_quote: Every student is unique; the greatest progress lies in a program designed just for you.
ozel-ders.intro: Our Private Tutoring program provides one-on-one guidance tailored to each student's needs and is designed to maximize academic achievement.
ozel-ders.body: Our expert instructors analyze each student's strengths and areas for improvement to create a fully personalized learning plan. This enables students to better understand topics they find challenging and achieve higher performance in exams.
ozel-ders.phase1_text: The student's current level and weak areas are identified to create a personalized roadmap.
ozel-ders.phase2_text: The expert instructor prepares a one-on-one lesson plan targeting identified weaknesses and implements it with the student.
ozel-ders.phase3_text: Progress is evaluated after every session and the program is updated according to the student's evolving needs.
ozel-ders.result_text: Eliminating weak areas, improving exam performance and reaching target scores.
ozel-ders.tech_intro: A personal learning experience fully shaped around the student's needs, guided by an expert instructor.
ozel-ders.tech_tools: One-on-one teaching · Personalized plan · Expert instructor · Continuous tracking
ozel-ders.meta_description: One-on-one private tutoring program. Personalized lesson plans with expert instructors.

rehberlik.title: Guidance
rehberlik.description: One-on-one psychological and academic guidance for career planning, motivation and exam anxiety.
rehberlik.hero_quote: Success comes with working in the right direction. Our guidance program helps you determine the direction.
rehberlik.intro: Our guidance program is a comprehensive counseling service that supports academic and personal development. Exam anxiety, career planning and parent communication are conducted together.
rehberlik.body: The process is transparently monitored through one-on-one sessions and regular parent reports.
rehberlik.phase1_text: One-on-one counseling on goal setting, field selection and creating a study plan.
rehberlik.phase2_text: Expert support for exam anxiety, low motivation and stress management.
rehberlik.phase3_text: Regular parent meetings and student progress reports.
rehberlik.result_text: Students with high confidence, goal-oriented focus and strong motivation.
rehberlik.tech_intro: One-on-one meeting opportunity with an expert teacher and counselor staff.
rehberlik.tech_tools: One-on-one sessions · Career plan · Parent report · Motivational support
rehberlik.meta_description: One-on-one guidance for career planning, exam anxiety management and motivation.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Education in Tarabya
About.content: Tarabya Final Academy was founded with the aim of providing quality LGS and YKS preparation to students in Sarıyer. Over the years, we have helped thousands of students reach their target high schools and universities.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be a trusted educational home where students in Tarabya and surrounding areas can access quality education in the easiest and most effective way.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To support every student in discovering their potential and reaching their academic goals. To make a difference with quality education, individual tracking and strong motivation.

founder.text: Quality in education is not a destination but an endless pursuit that continues in every student.

items.name: Elif K.
items.role: YKS — Hacettepe University / Faculty of Medicine (National Rank: 124)
items.text: I prepared with the VIP 12th Grade program. I ranked 124th nationally in YKS and got into Hacettepe Medicine. Individual tracking and weekly mock analyses made all the difference.

items.name: Kerem A.
items.role: YKS — Boğaziçi University / Computer Engineering (National Rank: 452)
items.text: Improving both TYT and AYT simultaneously felt daunting. The structured program here helped me peak in both. Boğaziçi Computer Engineering is now a reality.

items.name: Selin T.
items.role: YKS — Koç University / Faculty of Law (100% Scholarship)
items.text: With a personalized study plan, guidance support, and a highly motivated class environment, I earned a full scholarship to Koç University Faculty of Law.

items.name: Mert Ö.
items.role: YKS — ITU / Faculty of Architecture (National Rank: 890)
items.text: Weekly mock analyses pinpointed my weak areas and I closed every gap. I ranked 890th nationally in YKS and got into ITU Architecture. My teachers' contribution was immense.

items.name: Zeynep Ö. (Parent)
items.role: Daughter placed at her target high school via LGS
items.text: My daughter has been here since 6th grade. Both academic and psychological support were excellent.

items.name: Emre D.
items.text: I joined the program in 8th grade. Thanks to the intensive schedule and personalized lessons, I got into my target high school.

items.name: Neslihan A. (Parent)
items.role: Son studying at a quality high school via LGS
items.text: The teachers' individual attention to each student amazed us. My son gained confidence in a very short time.

items.name: Can T.
items.text: The detailed mock exam analyses helped me identify and close the gaps in my knowledge. I got a great result in LGS.
